column2: What is the official check-in time at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Official check-in begins at 15:00 (3:00 pm) and is handled by the 24-hour reception team.

column2: What is the official check-out time at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Check-out must be completed by 11:00 am to allow housekeeping to prepare rooms for arriving guests.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide free Wi-Fi throughout the property?
column3: Yes, unlimited high-speed Wi-Fi is provided free of charge in all guestrooms and public areas.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol operate a 24-hour front desk?
column3: Yes, reception is staffed around the clock so guests can arrive or request assistance at any hour.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have on-site parking and what is the daily cost?
column3: The hotel offers secure underground parking on site; spaces cost €15 per car, per day.

column2: Is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol a fully non-smoking hotel?
column3: Yes, the hotel is designated non-smoking; all indoor areas and rooms are smoke-free for guest comfort.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer meeting and event facilities?
column3: Yes, several flexible meeting rooms are available for conferences, banquets and private celebrations.

column2: Is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol accessible for guests with reduced mobility?
column3: The property is described as disabled-friendly, with step-free access, lifts and adapted rooms on request.

column2: Which room categories are available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Categories include Comfort, Superior Side Sea View, Deluxe Sea View, Deluxe Sea View Triple, Superior Side Sea View Triple and Family Rooms, all spread across nine floors.

column2: Do the rooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol include a private balcony or terrace?
column3: Yes, every guestroom features a furnished balcony or terrace, many offering partial or full sea views.

column2: Are the guestrooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol equipped with air-conditioning and heating?
column3: Yes, all 398 rooms have individually controlled air-conditioning and heating for year-round comfort.

column2: Does every room at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol feature free Wi-Fi and a flat-screen TV?
column3: Yes, free Wi-Fi and a satellite flat-screen television are standard amenities in every room category.

column2: Are baby cots available on request at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: No, the property does not provide infant cots or roll-away beds for guestrooms.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide daily housekeeping service?
column3: Yes, rooms are serviced daily, with beds made, towels replaced and bathrooms cleaned each day.

column2: Is there a laundry or dry-cleaning service at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, same-day laundry and dry-cleaning services can be arranged through reception for an extra fee.

column2: Are in-room safes provided at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, each room contains a personal safe; a small daily charge may apply for activation.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol serve a daily buffet breakfast?
column3: Yes, a generous buffet breakfast is served every morning in the main restaurant.

column2: What are the breakfast hours at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Breakfast is available from 07:30 until 10:00 daily.

column2: What is the price of breakfast at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The buffet costs €15 per adult and €7.50 per child when not included in the room rate.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol cater for vegetarian, vegan or gluten-free diets?
column3: Yes, the buffet offers clearly labelled vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free options at every meal.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have an on-site restaurant for lunch and dinner?
column3: Yes, the main Buffet Restaurant serves Mediterranean and international dishes for lunch and dinner.

column2: How many bars does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol operate and where are they located?
column3: The hotel operates four bars: a lobby bar, pool bar, snack bar beside the garden pool and the Skyline Bar on the rooftop terrace.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide room service?
column3: Yes, room service is available for drinks and light meals during specified hours.

column2: Are all-inclusive meal plans available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, optional all-inclusive rate plans cover buffet meals, snacks and selected beverages throughout the day.

column2: What is the minimum age required to check in at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The minimum legal age for check-in is 18 years when presenting valid photo identification.

column2: What is the standard cancellation policy at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Cancellation terms depend on the rate booked; flexible rates are free to cancel up to 24–48 hours before arrival, while non-refundable rates incur the full stay charge. [VERIFY]

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol allow pets?
column3: No, pets are not permitted to stay at the hotel, with the exception of certified assistance dogs.

column2: Can guests request early check-in or late check-out at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Early check-in or late check-out can be requested and is granted subject to the day’s availability and possible fees.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer luggage storage before check-in or after check-out?
column3: Yes, complimentary luggage storage is provided so guests can explore freely outside room hours.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have any designated smoking areas?
column3: Yes, although rooms are non-smoking, there are clearly marked outdoor areas where smoking is allowed.

column2: Are group bookings accepted at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol and whom should organisers contact?
column3: Group reservations are welcome; organisers should contact the hotel’s Meetings & Events team via the dedicated enquiry form or by telephone.

column2: Which payment methods are accepted at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The hotel only accepts major credit cards, including Visa, Mastercard and American Express; cash payments are not accepted at reception.

column2: How far is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol from Bajondillo Beach?
column3: Bajondillo Beach is roughly 400 metres away, an easy five-to-seven minute walk downhill.

column2: How far is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol from Málaga-Costa del Sol Airport?
column3: The airport is about 8 km from the hotel, a 15–20 minute journey by car or taxi.

column2: Which train station is closest to Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Torremolinos Cercanías station lies approximately 400 metres away, reachable in four minutes on foot.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol arrange airport transfers or shuttle services?
column3: The hotel does not run its own shuttle but reception can organise private taxi or minivan transfers on request.

column2: Is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol within walking distance of Calle San Miguel shopping street?
column3: Yes, Calle San Miguel begins less than 100 metres from the entrance, placing shops one minute away.

column2: How long does it take to reach Málaga city centre from Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol by train?
column3: The Cercanías train reaches Málaga Centro-Alameda station in approximately 25 minutes from Torremolinos.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol assist with on-site car rental or taxi bookings?
column3: Yes, the tour desk and 24-hour reception will arrange car hire, taxis and excursion tickets for guests.

column2: Is there convenient motorway access to Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol via the A-7?
column3: Yes, the A-7 Mediterráneo motorway can be joined about 2.6 km from the hotel for regional travel.

column2: How many swimming pools are available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol and are they seasonal?
column3: Three seasonal pools are provided: a panoramic rooftop pool, a large outdoor pool and a shallow children’s pool.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have a rooftop pool with panoramic views?
column3: Yes, the rooftop Sky Pool affords sweeping views over Torremolinos and the Mediterranean coastline.

column2: Is there an indoor pool at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, an indoor heated pool is located on the rooftop level for use during cooler months.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer a gym or fitness centre?
column3: Yes, a modern fitness room equipped with cardio and strength machines is available to all guests.

column2: Is there a sauna or wellness area at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, guests can relax in the on-site sauna situated beside the fitness area.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide massage treatments?
column3: Massage treatments can be booked through reception for an additional fee, subject to therapist availability. [VERIFY]

column2: Are there family facilities such as a children’s pool or game room at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, families appreciate the separate children’s pool and an arcade-style games room with billiards and table tennis.

column2: Can staff at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol arrange local tours or ticket assistance?
column3: Yes, the concierge team offers tour reservations, attraction tickets and insider advice on local sights.
